data.name: P.A. Place Hotel
data.introduction: P.A. Place hotel is located 5 minutes from Sawan National Park when travel by car. Each room has air conditioning and free wireless internet (Wi-Fi). Free parking for our guests, we provide 24 hours reception and out staffs can perform laundry service. 10 minutes from Wat Sriwong and Kao Kob and 30 minutes from Wat Woranatbopit if travel by car. Our room amenities include cable television, refrigerator, and shower. You can enjoy Thai cuisine at your restaurant. Many couples voted 8.3 score for this hotel as most suitable for couple stay and also voted for most worth it in Nakhon Sawan. We speak your language!

sha.name: Novotel Bangkok on Siam Square
sha.detail: Novotel Bangkok on Siam Square is a 4-star hotel in Bangkok. The hotel is in the heart of Bangkok’s shopping, business and entertainment districts. The hotel has 425 comfortable rooms and suites. All rooms feature modern facilities such as large bathrooms, working desk or designer sofa, free Wi-Fi, connectivity hub, mini-bar and 24-hour room service.
